sources.title: Red.Blooded.American.Girl.1990.DVDRip.x264-HANDJOB
sources.description: Two lab workers (Andrew Stevens, Heather Thomas) detect a vampire virus spreading at a scientist's (Christopher Plummer) blood clinic.

metadata.Plot: A young woman is transformed into a vampire by a virus. The vampire doctor who's treating her hires a young scientist to find a cure. He and the girl fall for each other hard, but she, mad from hunger, escapes to wreak havoc on the city.
metadata.Actors: Andrew Stevens, Heather Thomas, Christopher Plummer
